title: GUI Retextures
description: Makes GUI and HUD fancier - Dark mode, configurability with Respackopts
body:
This is a small pack I made to make Minecraft's GUIs look a bit more vibrant and interesting. Below you can see textures for the HUD and pretty much every container in the game. For game versions before 1.19.4, including 1.19.2 and 1.8, visit the [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gui-retextures/files/all) page. To download dark mode, click the "Versions" tab above this description. A separate mod support addon pack is available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-retextures-mod-support).








Need help, or have a question/request? My [discord server](https://discord.gg/EBb6PzN3fv) is the best place to ask.
